title: @rethunk/mcp-multi-root-git: git_show
description: Parameter schema for the 'git_show' MCP tool.

rootIndex.description: 0-based index into the MCP file roots list; ignored when workspaceRoot is set.

ref.description: Commit reference (SHA, branch, tag, or any git rev-spec).

path.description: Optional file path to inspect at the ref. If provided, shows that path's content at the ref instead of the diff.
